  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-secret-capability/input.js:7:3

   |   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Reference config keys in future provider metadata instead of embedding secrets.
